mistakes.title: Anthropic SDK 0.39.0 incompatible with modern httpx
mistakes.what: anthropic==0.39.0 in requirements.txt crashed with TypeError: Client.__init__() got unexpected kwarg 'proxies'
mistakes.why: httpx 0.28.x removed the proxies kwarg; old anthropic SDK still passes it
mistakes.avoid: use anthropic>=0.50.0; don't pin SDK majors when transitive deps move; test imports in fresh venv

mistakes.title: Claude Code --bare mode rejects subscription auth
mistakes.what: claude.exe -p with --bare flag returns 'Not logged in' even though Claude Code subscription is authenticated
mistakes.why: --bare mode requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; OAuth/keychain explicitly skipped
mistakes.avoid: do not use --bare for subscription-based usage; use normal mode with --no-session-persistence

mistakes.title: Windows .cmd wrapper mangles JSON braces / quotes in arguments
mistakes.what: claude.cmd from Python subprocess fails with 'is not recognized as an internal or external command' when prompts contain {}, <>, or quotes
mistakes.why: cmd.exe re-evaluates argument special chars; %* in .cmd wrapper passes them re-interpreted
mistakes.avoid: use claude.exe directly (not .cmd); for prompts with special chars, write to temp file and use --append-system-prompt-file

mistakes.title: fpdf2 multi_cell 'Not enough horizontal space' error
mistakes.what: PDF generation crashed mid-document on multi_cell call
mistakes.why: cursor x position not reset to left margin after preceding cell calls
mistakes.avoid: always pdf.set_x(pdf.l_margin) before multi_cell when state uncertain

mistakes.title: LinkedIn agent requires Anthropic API key (not zero-cost)
mistakes.what: linkedin_agent.py crashed when run for zero-cost guide generation
mistakes.why: Built before Claude Code subprocess pattern; uses Anthropic API directly
mistakes.avoid: use deal-sourcer/core/claude_client.py subprocess pattern for new agents; refactor opportunity for linkedin_agent.py

mistakes.title: Google blocking LinkedIn lead scraper
mistakes.what: linkedin_lead_finder.py returned 0 results for 31 consecutive Google queries
mistakes.why: Google detected scraping pattern, served blank results to non-browser UAs
mistakes.avoid: use WebSearch tool via Claude Code; or Brave Search API; or authenticated Playwright session

mistakes.title: Ralph story exceeds context window
mistakes.what: Ralph iteration runs out of context, produces broken code
mistakes.why: user stories sized for human reading, not one-shot AI implementation
mistakes.avoid: stories must fit one context window; if can't describe in 2-3 sentences, split it

mistakes.title: Ralph PRD has wrong dependency order
mistakes.what: Ralph fails because UI story runs before schema story
mistakes.why: stories execute in priority order; UI depends on schema
mistakes.avoid: always order: 1) schema/DB, 2) backend/actions, 3) UI, 4) aggregation

mistakes.title: Ralph criteria too vague to verify
mistakes.what: Stories with criteria like 'works correctly' or 'good UX' get skipped or guessed
mistakes.avoid: every criterion must be binary checkable e.g. 'Button shows confirmation dialog before deleting'

mistakes.title: Ralph commits broken code due to missing typecheck criterion
mistakes.avoid: always include 'Typecheck passes' as final criterion on every story

mistakes.title: Em dashes in outputs despite forbidden-character rule
mistakes.what: Drafts containing em dashes shipped despite explicit user rule
mistakes.why: em dashes pattern-match as polished writing for LLMs
mistakes.avoid: treat em dash as forbidden char; substitute with comma or split; pre-deliver grep check

mistakes.title: Upwork profile rejects strings with .com/.io/.ai
mistakes.why: Upwork anti-gaming heuristic blocks these substrings

mistakes.title: Saving HTML/MD as LinkedIn deliverable
mistakes.what: Generated HTML mockup of carousel instead of PNG/PDF
mistakes.avoid: LinkedIn captions=.txt, carousels=.png/.pdf, lead magnets=.pdf; never HTML or MD

mistakes.title: Almost replied to AI Tool Hub client without involving Josh
mistakes.what: Almost engaged client originating from Josh's catalog without loop-in
mistakes.why: Josh's NCN is permanent until contract specifies cooldown
mistakes.avoid: before any DM with client name, check 06-PARTNERSHIPS and AI Tool Hub catalog; loop Josh in or use 90-day cooldown release per signed contract

mistakes.mistake: Llama 3.3 70B emits em-dashes in ~10% of outputs despite explicit prompt rules
mistakes.mitigation: Regex post-cleanup in llm_client._enforce_voice is mandatory; do not rely on prompt alone

mistakes.mistake: Concurrent KB JSON mutations clobber each other
mistakes.mitigation: Always read fresh from disk per lead; never batch in memory; serial only, never thread

mistakes.mistake: Voice rules in prompts degrade as model versions drift; outputs slowly turn guru
mistakes.mitigation: Weekly review of agents/revops_intel/logs/voice_violations.jsonl; tighten prompts if guru substitutions trend up
